Bandwidth.description: Public IP bandwidth cap, unit: Mbps. Value range: 1–200. Default: 1.

BandwidthPackageId.description: Shared bandwidth package ID, indicates adding the public IP to the shared bandwidth package.

BillingType.description: Billing method for public IP. Values: 2: Pay-as-you-go—by bandwidth cap. 3: Pay-as-you-go—by actual traffic.

ISP.description: Line type for the public IP. Options: BGP: BGP (multi-line). ChinaMobile: China Mobile static single line. ChinaTelecom: China Telecom static single line. ChinaUnicom: China Unicom static single line.

ReleaseWithInstance.description: Whether the public IP is released with the instance; only applies to pay-as-you-go public IPs

SecurityProtectionTypes.description: Security protection type for public IP. Value: AntiDDoS_Enhanced: Apply for a public IP with enhanced protection, which can be added to a DDoS Native Protection (Enterprise Edition) instance.

DeploymentSetGroupNumber.description: When the ECS instance needs to join or adjust the deployment set strategy to the deployment set group high availability strategy (AvailabilityGroup), you can use this parameter to specify the group number of the instance in the deployment set.

DeploymentSetId.description: Deployment set ID the instance needs to join.

Eip.description: Public IP information bound to the instance

HostName.description: Instance hostname. For Linux, the hostname length must be 2–59 characters. For Windows, the hostname length must be 2–10 characters.

HpcClusterId.description: When creating a high-performance computing GPU instance, please specify the high-performance computing cluster ID.

InstanceChargeType.description: Billing type for the instance and cloud disk. Options: PostPaid: Pay-as-you-go. PrePaid: Yearly/monthly subscription. Esi: Elastic reservation instance. Segmented: Time-based elastic reservation instance.

KeepImageCredential.description: Whether to retain image settings. Values: true: Retain image settings. If retained, the instance will use the preset password or key pair from the image for login. false (default): Do not retain image settings.

KeyPairName.description: Key pair bound to the instance.

NetworkInterfaces.description: Network interface information mounted to the instance.

SecurityEnhancementStrategy.description: Enable security hardening. Active: Enable security hardening, applies only to public images. InActive: Disable security hardening, applies to all images.

SpotPriceLimit.description: Maximum hourly price for preemptible instances

SpotStrategy.description: Preemptible strategy for pay-as-you-go billing. Options: NoSpot: Create a regular pay-as-you-go instance. SpotAsPriceGo: System automatically bids, follows the current market price for preemptible instances. SpotWithPriceLimit: Preemptible instance with a bid limit.

SuffixIndex.description: Starting number for the sequential suffix

UniqueSuffix.description: Indicates whether to automatically add sequential suffixes to Hostname and InstanceName when creating multiple instances

Volumes.description: Cloud disk information bound to the instance

SecurityGroupIds.description: Security group ID associated with the network interface.

ScheduledInstanceDescription.description: Description of the elastic reservation order

ScheduledInstanceName.description: Name of the elastic reservation order

Key.description: Tag key for user tags added to the resource.

Value.description: User tag value added to the resource

DeleteWithInstance.description: Whether the cloud disk is released with the instance

ExtraPerformanceIOPS.description: Cloud disk extra IOPS performance size, supported only by ESSD FlexPL data disks, unit: operations/second. This parameter must be set when ExtraPerformanceTypeId is Balance or IOPS. The value ranges for each extra performance type are as follows: IOPS type: 1–50000. Balance type: 1–50000.

ExtraPerformanceThroughputMB.description: Extra throughput performance size for the cloud disk, in MB/s. Only supported by ESSD FlexPL data disks. This parameter must be set when ExtraPerformanceTypeId is Throughput. Value range: 1–650.

ExtraPerformanceTypeId.description: Type of cloud disk extra performance, supported only by ESSD FlexPL data disks. For more information about extra performance, see Cloud Disk Extra Performance. Values: Balance: Balanced extra performance. IOPS: IOPS extra performance. Throughput: Throughput extra performance.

Size.description: Cloud disk size, unit: GB. System disk: ESSD_PL0: 20–2048, PTSSD: 10–500. Data disk: ESSD_PL0: 10–32768, PTSSD: 20–8192

SnapshotId.description: Create a cloud disk using a snapshot, only supports creating data disks. You can call the DescribeSnapshots API to query the snapshot ID.

VolumeType.description: Cloud disk type. ESSD_PL0: Ultra-fast SSD PL0. PTSSD: Performance SSD.

description: An instance launch template is a collection of instance configuration information for quickly purchasing instances. You can store all configuration information except passwords in the template, including key pairs, compute specifications, cloud disks, networks, etc. If all configuration information is valid, you can purchase instances with one click without repeated configuration.

DefaultVersionNumber.description: Instance launch template default version number

LatestVersionNumber.description: Latest version number of the instance launch template.

LaunchTemplateProjectName.description: Project associated with the instance launch template.
